query:
SELECT 
  contract_external_id,
  period,
  is_suspended,
  is_bad_debt,
  is_closed,
  is_paid,
  is_future_period,
  is_current_period,
  principal,
  interest,
  fee,
  net_amount,
  total_amount,
  debt_range,
  due_date
FROM debt_target_cache
WHERE contract_external_id = 'CT0225-NYK003-9251-01'
ORDER BY period ASC;
